specific_question: What was the primary factor contributing to the success of the time-saving initiative carried out at Lee's Market's call centers in February 2025?
answer: The Lee's Market knowledge management team identified the implementation of decision trees in the customer support hotlines as the key factor behind the success of the time-saving initiative carried out in February 2025.
